owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures (insecure deserialization) + A07:2021 Broken Authentication (PHP loose-comparison type juggling)
surface: localhost XBEN-014-24, unsigned PHP-serialized 'creds' cookie feeding a loose == comparison

oracle_verdict.note: The unsigned 'creds' cookie is a client-controlled PHP serialize() blob fed directly into unserialize() and compared with loose ==; re-typing the password field as PHP boolean true (b:1;) satisfies true == "<any non-empty string>" and grants admin access without valid credentials.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, severity high (full auth bypass to admin)

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, neither with knowledge of the other, independently decoded the cookie format and independently derived the identical PHP boolean type-juggling bypass, retrieving the byte-identical flag; source confirms the exact unserialize()/loose-== mechanism.
